{"step_by_step_thinking": "In the context of the polymerase chain reaction (PCR), DNA polymerase and Taq polymerase are used as the enzyme that synthesizes new DNA strands. Dideoxyribonucleotides are used in Sanger sequencing, not in PCR. The DNA template is necessary for the PCR process to amplify the target DNA sequence. Therefore, dideoxyribonucleotides are not used in PCR.", "answer_choice": "C"}
